firedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the schedule fired (in UTC; not config.timezone — apply tz conversion downstream).

scheduledFor.description: The cron expression's intended fire time. Differs from firedAt if the host was offline + fired catch-up under missedFirePolicy.

cron.description: Echo of the cron expression that matched.

isCatchUp.description: true when this fire is a catch-up under missedFirePolicy (not a real-time fire).
